page: Microsoft Azure F64ams_v7 is a memory-intensive virtual machine from the Famsv7 family, powered by a dedicated AMD EPYC 9V45 processor. It features 64 physical cores and 64 vCPUs on the x86_64 architecture, running at a clock speed of 4.5 GHz under the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The system is equipped with 512.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It does not include any local storage or onboard GPUs, relying instead on remote Premium Storage capabilities.

Benchmark data places this server in the top tier for both single-core and multi-core CPU performance via stress-ng, as well as Passmark CPU and memory tests. Memory bandwidth is highly efficient, reaching 11,899.42 GB/sec for cached small blocks and 398.73 GB/sec for uncached large blocks. Database and key-value operations are exceptionally strong, with Redis SET operations reaching 170.72 million operations per second and static web serving throughput measured at 98.45 GB/sec.

While the server excels in CPU-bound and memory-intensive tasks, it exhibits clear tradeoffs. Large-scale LLM inference drops to average tier performance due to the absence of dedicated GPU hardware. Additionally, the lack of local storage requires architectural reliance on network-attached storage. This configuration is highly suited for memory-intensive databases, large-scale web serving, data compression tasks, and medium-scale CPU-based machine learning inference.
description: Microsoft Azure F64ams_v7 is a memory-intensive virtual machine from the Famsv7 family, configured with 64 dedicated AMD EPYC 9V45 vCPUs operating at 4.5 GHz and 512.0 GB of RAM. Running on the x86_64 architecture under Microsoft Hyper-V, this server delivers top-tier CPU and memory performance, as evidenced by stress-ng and Passmark benchmarks. It achieves exceptional memory bandwidth and handles up to 170.72 million Redis SET operations per second. However, the server lacks local storage and dedicated GPUs, which limits its efficiency for large-scale 70B LLM inference, where it delivers average performance. This instance is optimized for memory-intensive databases, high-throughput web serving, and CPU-driven enterprise workloads that utilize remote Premium Storage.
og_description: Microsoft Azure F64ams_v7 is a memory-intensive server with 64 AMD EPYC vCPUs and 512 GB RAM. It delivers top-tier CPU and memory bandwidth performance but lacks local storage and GPU accelerators.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure F64ams_v7 is a memory-intensive virtual machine featuring 64 AMD EPYC vCPUs, 512 GB RAM, and top-tier CPU performance.
tagline: A memory-intensive, high-vCPU virtual machine delivering top-tier memory bandwidth and processing power for demanding database and enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 64 dedicated AMD EPYC 9V45 vCPUs running at 4.5 GHz
512.0 GB of RAM providing 8.0 GB per core
Top-tier memory bandwidth and Redis database performance
No local storage, requiring remote Premium Storage
Best suited for memory-intensive databases and high-throughput web serving
